word: G5605 - ὠδίνω - ōdínō - o-dee'-no - Travail in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὠδίνω

- Transliteration: Odino

- Phonetic: o-dee'-no

- Definition:

1. to feel the pains of child birth, to travail

- Origin: from G5604

- TDNT entry: 20:07,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5604; to experience the pains of parturition (literally or figuratively): - travail in (birth).
